results.title: Bescom: Tenants will continue getting Gruha Jyothi benefits
results.description: Bescom assures tenants will retain Gruha Jyothi benefits amid ongoing verification; no extra paperwork required.

results.title: Somali Civil Society Coalition Backs Renewed Political Talks, Urges Inclusive Dialogue to End Crisis
results.description: Mogadishu (WDN) – The Somali Civil Society Organizations (SONSA) has welcomed renewed efforts to revive political dialogue between the Federal Government of Somalia and the Somali Future Council, describing the initiative as a crucial opportunity to resolve the country’s deepening political crisis through peaceful negotiations. In a press statement issued on July 4, 2026, SONSA... The post Somali Civil Society Coalition Backs Renewed Political Talks, Urges Inclusive Dialogue to End Crisis appeared first on WardheerNews .
